com.github.romualdrousseau.any2json.v2.base

Class AbstractTable

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.github.romualdrousseau.any2json.v2.base.AbstractTable
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Table, Visitable
    Direct Known Subclasses:
    CompositeTable, SimpleTable

    public abstract class AbstractTable
extends Object
implements Table, Visitable
